label: About
title: About Commons Repair Field
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 47 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 7 source windows around Towards Black Liberated Futures - Allied Media Projects and (1977) The Combahee River Collective Statement, plus 5 more. A source image from homegrownnationalpark.org helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Commons Repair Field: Create one finished still image of a maintained public commons where archive paper, soil beds, native-plant trials, and support scaffolding merge into a single field. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 7 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against large left black-ink archive document plate, large right black-ink civic paper field, and translucent amber acetate rails and clipped plot sheets.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
